scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "web,real,api" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm --prefix dashboard run dev" "cd realtime && npx cross-env RUST_LOG=info ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000 ADDRESS=0.0.0.0:4000 cargo run" "cd api && npx cross-env RUST_LOG=info ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000 ADDRESS=0.0.0.0:4001 cargo run"
